allow: Bash(node -e "const { pool } = require\('./config/db'\); Promise.all\([pool.query\(\\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='users'\\"\), pool.query\(\\"SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='trainers'\\"\)]\).then\(\([u,t]\) => { console.log\('USERS:', u.rows.map\(r=>r.column_name\)\); console.log\('TRAINERS:', t.rows.map\(r=>r.column_name\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")
